title: jasminum microcalyx
intro: Jasminum microcalyx, also known as the Himalayan jasmine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the jasmine family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum microcalyx include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
